profile_backed_target.source: bead plus fresh fixed-worker RCH baseline

lever.summary: Increase blocked packed-B GEMM k tile from KC=256 to KC=512

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Every output element still accumulates pc blocks in ascending pc order and l=0..kc in ascending order inside each pc block; no horizontal reductions or reassociation were introduced.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No comparisons or tie-breaking behavior in matmul_2d.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No FMA, mixed precision, or operation reordering per output element; only the k-block partition boundary changed.

validation.test_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf37-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture
validation.test_result: passed: 9 passed, 0 failed, 1 ignored, 1164 filtered out

benchmark.baseline_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1227854 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1227854 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf37-baseline2 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10
benchmark.after_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1227854 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1227854 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf37-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10

decision.reason: Target regressed from 507.00 ms median to 854.03 ms median on the same worker. Source was restored.
decision.next_primitive: Packed-A/register-blocked GEMM macro-kernel that reduces A reloads and C reload/store pressure without changing per-output ascending-k accumulation order.
